title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at L&T Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at L&T Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
